summary: Assessment identified 4 minor observations; no critical or high-severity threats were found.

findings.title: Missing X-Frame-Options Header
findings.description: The lack of X-Frame-Options makes the site vulnerable to clickjacking.
findings.remediation: Implement the x-frame-options header in the web server configuration.

findings.title: Missing X-Content-Type-Options Header
findings.description: Without this header set to 'nosniff', the browser may try to MIME-sniff the content, potentially executing malicious code.
findings.remediation: Implement the x-content-type-options header in the web server configuration.

findings.title: Missing Content-Security-Policy Header
findings.description: CSP helps mitigate XSS and other injection attacks. It is currently missing.
findings.remediation: Implement the content-security-policy header in the web server configuration.

findings.title: Missing Strict-Transport-Security Header
findings.description: HSTS should be enabled to force HTTPS connections.
findings.remediation: Implement the strict-transport-security header in the web server configuration.
